title: Changing Font in Emails Sent From Monday.com
excerpt:
Hello! 
It would be very helpful to have the ability to change the font when sending emails from Monday.com. The automatic font is the same used by most API’s and so it comes off very mass-emaily. 
Thanks, 
Pasha

posts.author: PJohnson (Pasha Johnson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

It would be very helpful to have the ability to change the font when sending emails from Monday.com. The automatic font is the same used by most API’s and so it comes off very mass-emaily.

posts.author: Catharine9399 (Catharine)
posts.cookedHtml: I would just like to indicate my strong desire for this feature as well. In looking through the community posts, it looks like users have been requesting the ability to select fonts and colors to mathc their email systems (Gmail and Outlook) for the past 5 years. Any updates here?
